CREATE TABLE time_test (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
SET TIME ZONE INTERVAL '+05:30' HOUR TO MINUTE;
SELECT event_time AT TIME ZONE CURRENT_TIMEZONE FROM time_test;
SET TIME ZONE INTERVAL '-08:00' HOUR TO MINUTE;
SELECT id, event_time, event_time AT TIME ZONE CURRENT_TIMEZONE FROM time_test WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM time_test);
SELECT event_time + INTERVAL '1 DAY' AS new_time FROM time_test;
SELECT id, event_time AT TIME ZONE INTERVAL '60' MINUTE FROM time_test WHERE event_time < (SELECT MIN(event_time) FROM time_test);
SELECT id, event_time, event_time AT TIME ZONE INTERVAL '3' HOUR AS adjusted_time FROM time_test WHERE event_time > '2023-01-01 12:00:00';
SET TIME ZONE INTERVAL '+02:00' HOUR TO MINUTE;
SELECT id FROM time_test WHERE event_time AT TIME ZONE CURRENT_TIMEZONE > (SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM time_test WHERE id < 2);
